scripts.release:prepare: bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run version-packages && bun run check && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n desktop,convex -c cyan,magenta "bun run dev:desktop" "bunx convex dev"
scripts.dist:mac: bun --filter=web run build:desktop && bun --filter=desktop run build && bun --filter=desktop run package:mac
scripts.release:mac: bun --filter=web run build:desktop && bun --filter=desktop run build && bun --filter=desktop run package:mac:release
